steps.title: Connect your brand
steps.description: Add your site, key pages and competitors to define the comparison space.

steps.title: Run your scenarios
steps.description: Test the real questions your buyers already ask in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini and more.

steps.title: Get the diagnosis
steps.description: See who gets cited, which narratives surface and what content angles are missing for your brand.

steps.title: Fix and monitor
steps.description: Apply recommendations, rerun the tests and measure whether your brand is gaining presence.
